reason: Verified that the SuperAgent can execute browser commands to navigate to example.com and retrieve the page title
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with agent list in sidebar
Found and clicked "QA-20260508-163819-ee91" agent in the sidebar — Agent chat interface opened with message input field ready
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the input field — Message appeared in the textbox and Send button became enabled
Clicked Send message button — Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "Browser Navigation and Page Title Retrieval" was created
Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response — Agent responded in approximately 8 seconds with the message "The page title is Example Domain."

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" and took full-page screenshot — Response clearly shows "The page title is Example Domain." with checkmarks indicating successful execution of both browser tool calls (Open Browser and Browser Command get title)
